message:
test(usage): add E2E tests for cm usage command

Comprehensive tests for the usage command covering:
- JSON and human-readable output formats
- Daily/monthly/all-time cost statistics
- Budget warnings at limit thresholds
- Progress bar rendering
- Zero/no limits handling
- Missing and corrupted cost files

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
